name: epiis-mcp-fullstack
description: Sistema de gestión académica EPIIS - Control centralizado

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run api --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "ngrok http --domain=krystina-weedier-howard.ngrok-free.dev https://localhost:3000"
